mapper.select: SELECT r.id as "id", r.type as "type", r.date_time as "date_time", r.applicant as "applicant", r.operator as "operator", r.remark as "remark", a.asset_no as "assetNo", a.brand as "assetBrand", a.type as "assetType", a.maintenance_id as "maintenanceId", a.serial_no as "serialNo", a.location as "location" FROM bus_asset_record_archive r LEFT JOIN bus_asset a ON r.asset_id = a.id WHERE r.archived_at = #{archivedTime} ORDER BY r.date_time DESC
